description_long: This is a single-propeller, low-wing monoplane with a streamlined fuselage and a classic WWII-era fighter design. The wings and tailplane are decorated with bold red and white diagonal stripes, while the fuselage is primarily dark with a blue-tinted cockpit canopy. The aircraft features a conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and a tailwheel landing gear configuration. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the cockpit is positioned just behind the engine, enclosed with a clear canopy. The landing gear appears to be fixed, with two main wheels and a small tailwheel visible.
description: A dark, single-propeller low-wing airplane with red and white striped wings and tail, featuring a blue-tinted enclosed cockpit and classic WWII styling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the propeller, symmetrical wing stripes, and the narrow fuselage profile.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, cockpit canopy, and the full span of the left wing with its red and white stripes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tailplane, single vertical stabilizer, and the striped pattern on both the wings and tail.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the right wing's striped pattern, the cockpit, and the propeller at the nose.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing monoplane with straight wings and no visible winglets; wings have a slight dihedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a three-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two main fixed gear and a single tailwheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy just behind the engine.
